author: Warren Johnson
name: Azure 1xH100 Frontier Repro Int5
blurb: Non-record single-H100 engineering capture of the March 20 frontier int5 family on Azure H100 NVL. Final pre-quant BPB reached 1.2591 and the exact int8+zlib roundtrip scored 1.26233375 under the 16,000,000-byte cap.
eval_scope: exact int8+zlib roundtrip completed; trailing eval tail interrupted after metric print
